title: OA lodge (canonical entity file)
description: One file per Order of the Arrow lodge: data/oa-lodges/<slug>.json. The OA is Scouting America's honor society; each council charters one lodge (a few large councils have more). Versioned entities (record-level SCD-2) so renames and mergers — which track council mergers — become lifecycle events. Seeded from the official OA lodge locator feed (oa-bsa.org); lodge officer names and contact emails from that feed are deliberately EXCLUDED as PII. `council` points at the chartering council; `section` is the OA administrative section code (region letter + section number, e.g. 'E6').

name.description: Lodge name during this window, e.g. 'Tamegonit'.

number.description: Lodge number (iconic identifier). Null when not carried by the source feed; backfilled from lodge registries later.

council.description: The chartering council, 'council:<slug>'; null if the council isn't in this dataset.

section.description: OA section code: region letter + section number, e.g. 'E6', 'G13W'.
